name: self-reference-pattern
description: Catalog domain test demonstrates self-reference pattern for hierarchies. Category has 'parent: Category?' (optional self-reference) and 'children: Category[]' (computed inverse). System auto-detects inverse relationship and generates computed view that filters collection by parent reference.
recommendation: Use same pattern for Team hierarchy: parent: 'Team?' for nullable parent reference, children: 'Team[]' for computed inverse. Root teams have null parent.
